allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"- {h['title']} | {h['slug']} | {h.get\('description',''\)} | downloads: {h.get\('downloads',0\)}\\"\) for h in data.get\('hits',[]\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x['path']\) for x in d.get\('tree',[]\) if x['type']=='blob']")

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -L -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" "https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/cursed-walking-a-modern-zombie-apocalypse/relations/dependencies?page=1&pageSize=100")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 bill@192.168.0.200 "echo '=== CPU ===' && lscpu | grep -E 'Model name|CPU\\\(s\\\)|Thread|Core|Socket' && echo '=== RAM ===' && free -h && echo '=== GPU ===' && nvidia-smi --query-gpu=name,memory.total,driver_version --format=csv,noheader 2>/dev/null || lspci | grep -i 'vga\\|3d\\|display' && echo '=== DISK ===' && df -h / && echo '=== OS ===' && uname -a && echo '=== OLLAMA ===' && which ollama && ollama --version && ollama list")
Bash(sshpass -p "REDACTED" ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 bill@192.168.0.200 "echo OK")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 -o PreferredAuthentications=password -o PubkeyAuthentication=no -o PasswordAuthentication=yes bill@192.168.0.200 "echo connected")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"{m['name']:40} {m.get\('size',0\)//1024//1024:>6}MB\\"\) for m in data.get\('models',[]\)]")
